features.name: struct typedef with logic bit field member
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef containing a logic bit field member

features.name: assignment pattern struct literal with bit field
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern literal for a struct containing a bit field

features.name: binary operator XOR applied to assignment pattern
features.description: Code should include a binary operator (XOR) applied to an assignment pattern expression

features.name: variable initialization with XOR of struct assignment pattern
features.description: Code should include a variable initialized with an XOR expression involving an assignment pattern struct literal
